top_categories.workout_context: 9,430ft of climbing means repeated surges above threshold. VO2max work is how you survive the fifth climb, not just the first.
Race-pace efforts that mimic Struggle Dales' demands. Pacing, fueling, and tactical decisions under fatigue. Practice the race before May.
Struggle Dales' mixed terrain forces constant power changes. Surge over the rough stuff, settle on the smooth, repeat for 109 miles.
87ft/mi means long efforts at or near FTP on every climb. If your threshold cracks at minute 15, you'll walk the rest.
At mile 60 of 109, glycogen is gone. This workout teaches your body to produce watts on fumes.
At Struggle Dales, surges push you above threshold and you have to recover while still riding. Over-unders train exactly that.
88–92% FTP is where you'll spend the hardest sustained miles of Struggle Dales. Train it until it feels boring.
Every hard session works better with a bigger aerobic base. At 109 miles, base fitness is the difference between racing and surviving.
9,430ft of climbing on grades that change every minute. You need to switch from seated to standing without losing rhythm.
How long can you hold 105% FTP before you blow? At Struggle Dales, that number decides whether you bridge or get dropped.
Short, max efforts are unavoidable. Punchy climbs, gap closures, attacks on mixed terrain. If you haven't trained them, you'll crack.
Endurance with intensity spikes baked in. Exactly what 9,430ft of climbing on mixed terrain does to your power file on race day.

race_overlay.nutrition: Target 60–80g carbs/hour for Struggle Dales’s 109 miles. Start fueling within the first 30 minutes — early fueling prevents late-race collapse. Bonking at mile 60 is a nutrition failure, not a fitness failure.
race_overlay.altitude: Struggle Dales with 9,430ft of climbing, much of it above 8,000ft demands altitude preparation. Arrive 5–7 days early for acclimatization. Expect 5–15% power reduction at altitude. Increase iron intake 4 weeks out. Hydrate aggressively — altitude increases fluid loss by 20–40%.
race_overlay.terrain: Mixed terrain at Struggle Dales requires surface adaptability. Include weekly rides on mixed terrain to build confidence.

pack_summary: This 10-workout pack focuses on VO2max, Race Simulation, and Gravel Specific to prepare you for 109 miles of mixed terrain in Harrogate, North Yorkshire, England.
